Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IWebViewMessageBus

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Message bus for cross-WebView communication. Allows publishing and subscribing to topics across multiple WebView instances, with the host runtime acting as mediator.

public interface IWebViewMessageBus

Methods

Publish(string, string?, string?)

Publishes a message to all subscribers of the given topic.

void Publish(string topic, string? payloadJson = null, string? sourceWebViewId = null)

Parameters

topic string

The topic to publish to.

payloadJson string

Optional JSON payload.

sourceWebViewId string

Optional ID of the WebView that originated the message.

Subscribe(string, Action<WebViewMessage>)

Subscribes to a topic. Receives all messages published to that topic.

IDisposable Subscribe(string topic, Action<WebViewMessage> handler)

Parameters

topic string

The topic to subscribe to.

handler Action<WebViewMessage>

Callback invoked for each matching message.

Returns

IDisposable

A disposable that removes the subscription when disposed.

Subscribe(string, string, Action<WebViewMessage>)

Subscribes to a topic with a target WebView filter. Only receives messages whose SourceWebViewId matches targetWebViewId.

IDisposable Subscribe(string topic, string targetWebViewId, Action<WebViewMessage> handler)

Parameters

topic string

The topic to subscribe to.

targetWebViewId string

Only receive messages from this source WebView ID.

handler Action<WebViewMessage>

Callback invoked for each matching message.

Returns

IDisposable

A disposable that removes the subscription when disposed.
